backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and backend logic for Director, AdvertisingRegistration, Technician, and UserProfile entities, with access-control-gated CRUD operations and a seeded technician dataset.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the removal of the 'Welcome to Ad Tribe' onboarding modal (ProfileSetup component), with references to affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's current purpose and notable changes, serving as a build/planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom property tokens for colors, borders, charts, and sidebar used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the AD TRIBE React app, loading Google Fonts (Bebas Neue, Inter) and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all app routes (landing, profile, dashboard, connections, registration, director, production house) with auth guards and a root layout using AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Availab: Interactive monthly calendar component that toggles selected availability dates from a simple Date array, with optional read-only mode.
Simple legend component displaying color-coded indicators for Available, Booked, and Unavailable calendar states.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout component that renders a sticky header with navigation, login/logout button using Internet Identity, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Locatio: Placeholder profile form for shoot locations that redirects users to the registration flow instead of providing an inline form.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Product: Placeholder profile form for production houses that redirects users to the registration flow instead of providing an inline form.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Profess: Displays a read-only view of a professional's advertising registration details (name, city, department, designation, experience) fetched from the backend, with a fallback to prompt registration.
frontend/src/components/profiles/VendorP: Placeholder profile form for equipment vendors that redirects users to the registration flow instead of providing an inline form.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty file — the ProfileSetup onboarding modal component has been removed entirely.
frontend/src/components/registration/Dir: Registration form for directors featuring a custom date range picker calendar component for selecting shoot availability windows.
frontend/src/components/registration/Inl: Multi-step professional registration form with department/designation selects, an availability date picker calendar, and submission via the backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/registration/Pro: Registration form for production houses collecting name, address, executive producers (up to 3), contact number, work reel URL, and industry reference email with client-side validation.
frontend/src/components/search/ProviderC: Presentational card component that displays a provider's name, type, optional description, and up to 4 tags with an overflow badge.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: A search input component with a search icon that accepts a query string and a setter function as props.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchFil: A filter component rendering a dropdown to select provider type (all, professional, vendor, location) for search results.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchRes: Displays search results or a placeholder message; shows skeleton loaders while loading and an empty state when no results are found.
frontend/src/components/TribalLeaderRegi: Modal component allowing users to select a Tribal Leader role (Director or Production House) and navigate to the corresponding registration page.
frontend/src/components/tribe/TribeAvail: A form component for directors or production houses to search for available technicians by project details, shoot dates, city, and required roles.
Displays technician search results split into same-city and other-city matches, with individual cards showing name, role, city, and contact number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login, logout, and identity persistence via DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, professional/director registrations, verified members, and technician search.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file configuring Tailwind and defining light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the AD TRIBE design system (forest green, saffron, cream palette).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectionsPage.tsx: Displays a list of verified AD TRIBE members fetched via query hooks, showing each member's principal ID with a 'Verified' badge and loading skeletons while fetching.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Renders the main dashboard with two navigation cards linking to the user's profile page and the connections/tribe page.
frontend/src/pages/DirectorRegistrationP: Page wrapper for the Director registration flow that renders DirectorRegistrationForm and navigates to the success page on completion.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: The public landing page featuring feature cards, stats, an inline registration form, tribe availability search, and a tribal leader registration modal, with authentication-gated access to certain features.
frontend/src/pages/ProductionHouseRegist: Page wrapper for the Production House registration flow that renders ProductionHouseRegistrationForm and navigates to the home page on success.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's AD TRIBE profile including account info and professional registration details, with label mappings for designations and areas of expertise.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Standalone registration page that renders InlineRegistrationForm and redirects to the success page upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationSuccessPa: Confirmation page shown after successful registration, with buttons to navigate to the dashboard or profile page.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Utility functions for converting between JavaScript Date objects and nanosecond-precision bigint Time values, plus date formatting and date range generation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Ad Tribe frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (saffron, forest, gold), fonts, shadows, animations, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Ad Tribe project state at version 3, documenting that the onboarding modal has been removed so users land directly on the main app, and recording existing features and architectural notes.
